name: Four Seasons — CRM login pending then launch (Onboarding)

messages.content: @Kenneth have you been able to log into the CRM? Once we get the green light we'll turn everything on. On phone use Lead Connector; on desktop app.evolutesolutions.io.

expect.next: Confirm CRM login completed; then launch/turn everything on.

messages.content: Ads are on; I'll send you more info soon.

expect.next: Follow up on the requested client deliverable/confirmation so we can proceed.

name: JJ — ready to proceed and turn everything on

messages.content: We have ads access. Everything is set up, he confirmed he's added properly, we can proceed and turn everything on.

expect.next: Confirm final checks and turn campaigns on.

messages.content: Let's get on a call to resolve Meta payment method linking.

expect.next: Schedule a call and resolve Meta payment linking.

messages.content: We paused while he was sick, he's ready to resume Monday.

expect.status: Paused but client ready to resume
expect.next: Re-launch on the stated date and confirm performance checks.

messages.content: We're waiting on their license to start running ads.

expect.next: Confirm license readiness; launch immediately after confirmation.

name: Prestige — waiting on pictures and Loom watch

messages.content: Sent a Loom; waiting on pictures to relaunch.

expect.next: Collect requested pictures/videos; then relaunch updated creative.

name: Satin Touch — onboarding, waiting on lead spreadsheet

messages.content: Please send the lead spreadsheet when you can.
Following up on the lead list so we can proceed.

expect.next: Get the spreadsheet from the client (lead list), then proceed.

name: Lone Star — launched, now verify and follow up

messages.content: Launched this week — let's monitor leads and adjust.

expect.next: Verify launch setup quality and follow up on lead handling over next few days.

messages.content: We launched the flooring ads this week — thanks for the content you sent over.

expect.next: Verify launch setup quality and follow up on lead handling over next few days.

messages.content: I’m in the field — I’ll send you an update on the leads later today.

expect.next: Follow up for lead report/outcomes and confirm handling process.

messages.content: Appreciate the info. Once you confirm the CRM login we’ll turn everything on.

expect.next: Confirm CRM login completed; then launch/turn everything on.

messages.content: We launched already — here’s your CRM login info again. Let me know once it’s set up properly.

expect.next: Confirm CRM login is set up and everything is clear; monitor leads and support.

messages.content: We’ve been running for months. Can you share feedback on the recent leads and appointments?
I'll add it to my list and get back to you with an update on the leads.

expect.next: Follow up for lead report/outcomes and confirm handling process.

name: Interior Redesign — paused after launch; client dissatisfied and out of budget

messages.content: We launched but I’m dissatisfied with the quality and I ran out of money, so I stopped the ads.

expect.next: Acknowledge concerns, outline fixes (incl. campaign adjustments), and reply now.

messages.content: Lead quality is poor; I’m not happy with these results.
Forwarding his complaints here as well so we have them tracked.

expect.next: Acknowledge concerns, outline fixes (incl. campaign adjustments), and reply now.

name: Tillup — launched; recent Q&A, not urgent

messages.content: How do I send the estimate?
Clarified the steps on March 10; he replied thanks.

expect.next: Light check-in on outcomes later this week (not urgent).

messages.content: He’s good, please resend the email to give him access to the CRM.
Reset login info.
Now we should confirm the other guy got into the CRM and check in on how things are going.

expect.next: Confirm CRM login is set up and everything is clear; monitor leads and support.

messages.content: Did you receive the test notification? Please confirm.

expect.next: Follow up for confirmation; if no reply, resend the test notification and confirm receipt.

messages.content: Here’s the performance report for review.
Leads aren’t converting well.

expect.next: Acknowledge the report and propose 2–3 concrete campaign changes; ask for constraints/preferences; offer a quick call.

messages.content: Following up on the proposal and your partner’s update.

expect.next: Send a concise follow-up; if no reply in 48–72 hours, mark lost and note the reason.

name: JJ Remodeling — ensure everything is on

messages.content: We should make sure everything is on and confirm with the client that it’s live.

expect.next: Ensure all campaigns are on and confirm with the client that everything is live.
